findings.description: Bold emphasis on 'TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE' is removed in the HTML, making it indistinguishable from the surrounding non-bold header lines ('NEUSE RIVER BASIN HYDROLOGIC MODEL' and 'MEETING').
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE' is rendered in bold to differentiate it from the non-bold 'NEUSE RIVER BASIN HYDROLOGIC MODEL' and 'MEETING' lines. In the HTML, all three lines appear in the same weight with no bold distinction.
